name: Security Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, lending, and digital banking services through online and mobile platforms.
description_long:
Security Bank is a traditional FDIC-insured bank that provides comprehensive personal and business banking services. The bank operates with federal deposit insurance backing, giving customers protection on their deposits. The institution maintains physical branch locations alongside a full digital banking presence.

Security Bank offers a broad range of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, CDs, IRAs, and personal loans. For business customers, they provide business checking, business savings, business lending, agricultural lending, and merchant services. The bank also offers mortgage lending (home purchase, refinance, home equity loans) and credit card products for both personal and business use.

The bank distinguishes itself through modern digital capabilities including mobile banking apps, mobile deposit, online bill pay, eStatements, and the Card Valet debit card management app. They emphasize convenience and accessibility across devices, with a recently redesigned website. Agricultural lending is a notable specialty service, suggesting regional presence in farming communities.

As a full-service traditional bank, Security Bank is best suited for customers seeking a combination of physical branch access and digital banking convenience. The main limitation is that the website provides no detail on specific rates, fees, minimum balances, or competitive positioning against other banks. Consumers should contact the bank directly or visit locations to compare product terms and pricing. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business lending and business credit cards
Mobile banking app with mobile deposit
Card Valet debit card management app
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, mortgages, and business lending
Mobile banking app with check deposit capability available anywhere, anytime
Card Valet app for real-time debit card management and transaction monitoring
Dedicated agricultural lending services for farm and rural business customers
Multiple online service channels including eStatements, bill pay, and mobile deposit
Physical branch locations combined with digital banking accessibility
cons: Website provides no information on account fees, minimum balances, or interest rates for comparison
No details on credit card APR, rewards programs, or card-specific terms
Limited transparency about loan rates, terms, or qualification requirements
No mention of customer service hours, contact methods beyond general 'Contact Us', or support availability
Website does not specify geographic service area or number/location of branches for convenience assessment

contact.address: 112 E Main St, New Auburn, WI 54757

best_for: Business owners and agricultural operators needing specialized lending and business cash management services
Customers seeking integrated personal and mortgage lending from a single FDIC-insured institution
Tech-savvy consumers wanting mobile banking, digital deposit, and modern account management apps
Customers in regions with Security Bank branch locations who value both physical access and online banking
diagnosis: Security Bank is best for individuals and businesses seeking traditional FDIC-insured banking with modern digital convenience, particularly those in agricultural sectors or needing integrated personal-mortgage-business services. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent pricing and rate information on the website; prospective customers must contact the bank directly to compare competitiveness on fees, interest rates, and loan terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 112 E Main St, New Auburn, WI 54757
